changes: Moved src/state, src/board, src/shell, src/report, src/objdiff, src/handoff, src/env, and src/types into packages/core/src.
Added package exports for @decomp-orchestrator/core root and subpaths: board, env, handoff, objdiff, report, shell, state, and types.
Updated root TypeScript paths and root tsconfig include so moved package code is checked by bun run check.
Updated remaining src/ and tests imports to consume @decomp-orchestrator/core package exports.
Split graph-aware board ranking out of core board code by adding a knowledge-owned loadKnowledgeBoardSnapshot wrapper.
Kept root CLI scripts pointing at src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts until the CLI app phase.

boundary_refactors.issue: src/board/snapshot.ts imported src/knowledge/index.ts for graph DB paths, graph opening, and rank features.
boundary_refactors.resolution: packages/core board accepts a codeGraphFunctionsIndexPath and rankFeatureProvider through LoadBoardSnapshotOptions; src/knowledge/board.ts supplies those from knowledge paths and graph ranking.

boundary_refactors.issue: The fallback board path depended on knowledgeSourcesRoot.
boundary_refactors.resolution: The fallback code-graph functions index is now passed by the knowledge wrapper via codeGraphFunctionsIndexPath().

commands.summary: Root TypeScript check passed with packages/core included and remaining src consumers importing @decomp-orchestrator/core.
Root smoke passed, including graph-ranking smoke through loadKnowledgeBoardSnapshot.
Workspace install reported no changes after core package export updates.
Root CLI help still prints usage through the compatibility entrypoint.
Knowledge command smoke still listed registered sources and tools after knowledge started importing core exports.

dependency_evidence.packages_core_forbidden_import_scan: No packages/core/src imports of apps, agents, or knowledge were found.
allowed_core_mentions: packages/core/src/types keeps agent role type names because these are shared runtime types, not package imports.
